CustomField.formula: Total_Subscription_Fees__c - (Total_Subscription_Fees__c - Total_Subscription_Fees_Year_1__c - Total_Subscription_Fees_2nd_Year__c - Total_Subscription_Fees_3rd_Year__c - Total_Subscription_Fees_4th_Year__c - Total_Subscription_Fees_5th_Year__c - Total_Subscription_Fees_6th_Year__c)
CustomField.label: Total Subscription without adjustments
